coreIssue: This 1:1 is likely about whether a junior Product Designer three months in feels clear on expectations and safe asking for help.
openingQuestion: What feels most unclear about what good looks like for you right now, especially when requirements shift?
listenFor: whether he names a specific project or recent change where expectations became fuzzy
whether if they need help, he describes waiting, working around it, or asking someone early
whether he points to a team habit, review pattern, or missing context that makes the role harder
avoid: do not turn normal three-month uncertainty into a performance judgement
do not rush to reassure or solve before you hear where expectations or support feel fuzzy
goodOutcome: You and Kenji have agreed one concrete way a junior Product Designer should surface confusion early, plus one expectation you will make more explicit in his current work.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one recent project where requirements shifted so you can test whether the friction is expectation clarity, support access, or prioritisation.
